stories.title: Silver Price Forecast: XAG/USD plunges, clearing key levels below $70
stories.summary: Silver price (XAG/USD) retreats late in the North American session, down by over 6.80% in the day, poised to finish the week with losses of more than 15.70%, posting its second-largest weekly loss since the one that ended down 17.39% on January 30. At the time of writing, XAG/USD

stories.title: Banxico seen holding rates at 7% amid war-driven inflation risks
stories.summary: A Reuters poll revealed that the Bank of Mexico, also known as Banxico, is expected to keep interest rates steady at 7% at the March 26 meeting amid concerns about the Middle East war.

stories.title: Forecasting the upcoming week: Hawkish Fed meets escalating Iran war
stories.summary: The US Dollar (USD)i weakened this week, with the US Dollar Index (DXY) slipping back below 100.00 to 99.60 on Friday after a surge in the middle of the week driven by the Federal Reserve's (Fed) decision to hold rates in the 3.50%-3.75% range.

stories.title: Gold slips near $4,500 as Oil rally and US yields weigh on bullion
stories.summary: Gold (XAU/USD) price extended on Friday its losses for the eighth straight day, poised to end the week down by more than 8.50% as Oil prices continued to rally, boosting the haven appeal of the Greenback.

stories.title: USD/CHF flat as Fed outlook and Oil-driven USD demand limit downside
stories.summary: The Swiss Franc (CHF) trades flat against the US Dollar (USD) on Friday, reversing part of its earlier gains as the Greenback eases slightly from daily highs. At the time of writing, USD/CHF is trading around 0.7878 after briefly touching the 0.7900 mark.

stories.title: Gold set for third weekly loss as 'higher-for-longer' interest rate outlook weigh
stories.summary: Gold (XAU/USD) extends losses on Friday following a sharp two-day decline that pushed prices to their lowest level since early February, near the $4,500 mark.

stories.title: Dow Jones Industrial Average slides as Iran war, hawkish Fed drive fourth losing week
stories.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJIA) tumbled around 257 points, or 0.6%, on Friday as all three major US indices tracked toward a fourth consecutive losing week. The S&P 500 fell 0.8%, while the Nasdaq Composite underperformed with a decline of 1.2%.

stories.title: EUR/USD Price Forecast: Pair struggles below 1.1600 as sellers maintain control
stories.summary: EUR/USD trades with a mild downside bias on Friday as a modest rebound in the US Dollar (USD) weighs on the Euro (EUR), with price action lacking follow-through buying after failing to sustain a break above the 1.1600 mark.

stories.title: GBP/USD trips down below 1.3350 as Oil surges, Fed outlook boosts US Dollar
stories.summary: GBP/USD trims some of its previous-day gains on Friday, down by 0.84%, as traders turn risk-averse amid an escalation of the Middle East war and price in no rate cuts by the Federal Reserve (Fed) in 2026. At the time of writing, the pair trades below 1.3350 after hitting a daily

stories.title: AUD/USD falls as geopolitical tensions overshadow RBA rate hike
stories.summary: AUD/USD trades lower around 0.7040 on Friday at the time of writing, down 0.68% on the day, as the pair is pressured by a return of safe-haven demand despite supportive domestic factors in Australia.

stories.title: USD/CAD rebounds as weak Canadian Retail Sales and firmer USD weigh on Loonie
stories.summary: USD/CAD recovers from intraday lows on Friday as softer-than-expected Canadian Retail Sales data weighs on the Canadian Dollar (CAD), while a rebound in the US Dollar (USD) provides additional support to the pair.

stories.title: Federal Reserve: Higher-for-longer stance maintained – Nordea
stories.summary: Nordea’s Sara Midtgaard reports that the Federal Reserve left its policy rate unchanged and signalled only gradual easing, with one 25 bp cut projected in both 2026 and 2027.

stories.title: US sends thousands of Marines and three warships to Middle East – WSJ
stories.summary: Citing officials, the Wall Street Journal reported on Friday that the Pentagon is sending roughly "2,200 to 2,500 Marines from the California-based USS Boxer amphibious ready group and 11th Marine Expeditionary Unit," to the Middle East, alongside three warships.

stories.title: Dollar strength returns on geopolitics – Scotiabank
stories.summary: Scotiabank’s global FX strategy team reports broad Dollar strength as G10 performance realigns with early US/Iran conflict patterns. They stress fragile risk sentiment as markets reassess prolonged conflict risks, central bank paths and violent yield repricing.

stories.title: USDCAD: Range holds as CAD outperforms – Scotiabank
stories.summary: Scotiabank’s Analyst Team notes the Canadian Dollar is modestly firmer versus the Dollar and leading G10 peers, echoing its earlier conflict-phase outperformance. They highlight narrowing yield spreads and a relatively muted Bank of Canada meeting as key drivers.

stories.title: EUR/GBP rises as markets assess ECB and BoE rate decisions, inflation outlook
stories.summary: EUR/GBP edges higher on Friday, recovering losses recorded in the previous day after the European Central Bank (ECB) and Bank of England (BoE) monetary policy announcements.

stories.title: Fed’s Waller: Do not think there is a need to consider rate hikes
stories.summary: Christopher Waller, a member of the Federal Reserve (Fed), said that based on the jobs report alone, he was planning to dissent in the monetary policy decision, but inflation has become more of a concern.

stories.title: USD/JPY rebounds as US Dollar strengthens, BoJ hawkishness tempers upside potential
stories.summary: USD/JPY trades around 158.70 on Friday at the time of writing, up 0.61% on the day, staging a clear rebound after Thursday’s sharp decline. The move comes as the US Dollar (USD) regains traction following a bout of volatility, with markets reassessing the outlook for US monetary

stories.title: Oil: Supply response tempers geopolitical spike – OCBC
stories.summary: OCBC’s Sim Moh Siong highlights that crude briefly surged toward USD120/bbl on Iranian attacks before easing as US officials signalled supply support and Israel suggested faster de-escalation.

stories.title: Gold: Near-term pressure versus structural support – OCBC
stories.summary: OCBC’s Christopher Wong reports that Gold has come under pressure as rising global yields and renewed inflation risks reduce expectations for near-term rate cuts, prompting ETF outflows and stress-driven liquidation.

stories.title: SEC crypto guidance puts the 'final nail' in the Gensler era: Analyst
stories.summary: The SEC's digital asset market taxonomy, which classifies most cryptocurrencies and tokens as non-securities, is a major step for US regulators.

stories.title: Bitcoin options signal fear even as BTC ETF outflows remain relatively low
stories.summary: Bitcoin ETF outflows are too small to signal a bearish pivot from traders, but worsening US macroeconomic conditions and high oil prices keep BTC traders on the hedge.

stories.title: Ethereum eyes 25% rally as richest ETH whales return to 'profitable state'
stories.summary: ETH price could climb toward $2,750 by June and above $3,200 by September if the historical whale-profit signal plays out again.

stories.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
stories.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

stories.title: Hong Kong retiree loses $840K in triple ‘crypto expert’ scam
stories.summary: Hong Kong police say a 66-year-old retiree was duped three times in six months by self-styled “crypto investment experts,” as scammers promised easy gains and help to recover losses.

stories.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty falls 7.7% as miner pressure persists
stories.summary: Bitcoin’s mining difficulty just logged its second sizeable cut of 2026, easing conditions for remaining miners as competition from artificial intelligence data centers rises.

stories.title: Early Ethereum whale rebuilds stack with $19.5M in ETH buys
stories.summary: Early Ethereum whale thomasg.eth is rebuilding his position with $19.5 million in ETH purchases this week, as BitMine’s Tom Lee calls for the end of “crypto winter.”

stories.title: Bitcoin weakness deepens as war pushes traders to cut risk in BTC and stocks
stories.summary: Bitcoin price remains rocky, and BTC and equities ETF outflows soar as the US and Israel-Iran war enters a fourth week.

stories.title: Gold sees biggest weekly fall in 43 years as Iran war rages on
stories.summary: Gold is also being impacted by rising anticipation that the US Federal Reserve won’t cut interest rates this year, while Fed chair Jerome Powell said inflation would rise.

stories.title: Grayscale files S-1 for Hyperliquid ETF, joining Bitwise, 21Shares
stories.summary: Unlike Bitwise, Grayscale doesn’t plan to incorporate staking for its Hyperliquid ETF but hasn’t ruled out integrating it in the future.
